cleanse.ex: She used a special soap to cleanse her skin thoroughly.

cleanser.def: 清潔劑、洗面乳人物 (單數)
cleanser.ex: They sold a lot of this new facial cleanser last week.

cleansing.ex: She applied the cleansing lotion to her face before bed.

clear.def: 清楚的、清晰、明朗的人的人物
clear.col: clear up, make clear, clear out, clear consciences
clear.ex: The instruction for the new game is very clear and simple.

clearance.def: 距離、清理、獲准的人物 (單數)
clearance.col: security clearance, clearance sale, ground clearance
clearance.ex: The shop is holding a massive clearance sale this week.

cleared.def: 已清理的、已獲准的人的人 (或物)
cleared.ex: The workers cleared the area of all the old garden waste.

clear-headed.ex: He managed to remain clear-headed during the emergency.

clearing.def: 林中空地、清理的人 (或物)
clearing.ex: They found a peaceful forest clearing to set up the tent.

clearly.ex: She stated clearly that she was not happy with the plan.

clear-out.ex: We need a thorough clear-out of the attic this weekend.

cleat.def: 繫繩扣、鞋底防滑釘的人的人物
cleat.ex: He wore his heavy football cleats for the muddy game.

cleavage.def: 分裂、裂縫、乳溝的人物 (單數)
cleavage.ex: The dress was criticized for showing too much cleavage.

cleave.def: 劈開、分裂、黏著的人的人
cleave.ex: The sailor used a sharp knife to cleave the heavy rope.

cleaver.def: 切肉大刀、劈的人的人物 (單數)
cleaver.ex: The butcher used a meat cleaver to chop the heavy bones.

clef.ex: The treble clef is used for the higher notes in music.

cleft.def: 裂縫、裂開的、(cleave的)人物 (單數)
cleft.ex: He has a very distinctive cleft chin like his father.

clematis.ex: A climbing clematis was growing all over the garden wall.

clemency.def: 仁慈、寬厚、溫和的人物 (單數)
clemency.ex: The prisoner's family decided to beg for royal clemency.

clement.def: 仁慈的、溫和的人的人物
clement.ex: The clement weather this year helped the farmers greatly.

clench.ex: I saw him clench his fists in sudden anger and pain.

clenched.def: 緊握了的、咬緊的人的人 (或物)
clenched.ex: He spoke through clenched teeth, trying to stay calm.

clergy.def: 神職人員、牧師(總稱) (單數)
clergy.ex: Many local members of the clergy attended the meeting.

clergyman.ex: The parish clergyman visited the sick woman yesterday.

clerical.def: 辦公室的、文書的、牧師的的人的人物
clerical.ex: The problem was caused by a simple clerical error tonight.
